services.title: Taxi Booking Services
services.subtitle: Dispatch Management
services.shortDescription: Professional 24/7 taxi booking and dispatch management for private hire companies across all major platforms.
services.fullDescription: We provide professional, round-the-clock taxi booking and dispatch management for private hire and taxi companies. Our trained operators work directly within your chosen platform, handling every call, booking, and dispatch with speed and precision — so you never miss a fare.

benefits.title: Zero Missed Bookings
benefits.description: Every incoming call answered promptly, every booking captured and dispatched correctly

benefits.title: 24/7 Live Operator Coverage
benefits.description: Real human agents available around the clock — nights, weekends and holidays included

benefits.title: Multi-Platform Certified
benefits.description: Expert operators across Autocab, iCabbi, Cab 9, Cordic, Cab Treasure and Data Master

benefits.title: Driver Coordination
benefits.description: Efficient allocation and real-time communication with your driver fleet

benefits.title: Surge & Peak Management
benefits.description: Scaled capacity during busy periods to maintain service quality at all times

benefits.title: Detailed Reporting
benefits.description: Regular performance reports covering call volumes, bookings and response times

services.title: Customer Support
services.subtitle: Support Excellence
services.shortDescription: Dedicated inbound and outbound support agents representing your brand professionally across every communication channel.
services.fullDescription: Our dedicated support agents represent your brand with professionalism and care across every channel. From inbound call handling to complaint resolution and proactive outreach, we deliver a seamless customer experience that builds loyalty and drives retention.

benefits.title: Inbound & Outbound Handling
benefits.description: Full call management — enquiries, complaints, follow-ups and everything in between

benefits.title: Multi-Channel Support
benefits.description: Phone, email, live chat, WhatsApp and social media — all professionally managed

benefits.title: Brand-Aligned Communication
benefits.description: Agents trained on your tone, scripts and values to represent your brand authentically

benefits.title: Complaint Resolution
benefits.description: Structured escalation processes that turn complaints into loyalty-building moments

benefits.title: Customer Retention Focus
benefits.description: Proactive strategies to reduce churn and increase long-term customer value

benefits.title: Monthly Performance Reviews
benefits.description: Full analytics on CSAT scores, handle times, resolution rates and more

services.title: Digital Marketing
services.subtitle: Digital Growth
services.shortDescription: From SEO and paid ads to social media management — we build your brand authority and drive measurable leads.
services.fullDescription: From search engine dominance to high-converting paid campaigns, our digital marketing team drives measurable growth for your business online. We build your brand authority, generate quality leads, and turn browsers into loyal customers — all with transparent ROI reporting.

benefits.title: Search Engine Optimisation (SEO)
benefits.description: On-page, off-page and technical SEO to rank higher and attract organic traffic

benefits.title: Google & Meta Paid Advertising
benefits.description: Data-driven ad campaigns that deliver maximum return on every pound spent

benefits.title: Social Media Management
benefits.description: Consistent, engaging content across Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn and more

benefits.title: Content Creation & Strategy
benefits.description: Professional copy, graphics and video content crafted to convert and engage

benefits.title: Email Marketing Campaigns
benefits.description: Targeted email sequences that nurture leads and drive repeat business

benefits.title: Analytics & ROI Reporting
benefits.description: Monthly dashboards showing exactly how your marketing investment is performing

services.title: Web Development
services.subtitle: Digital Presence
services.shortDescription: Custom mobile-first websites, e-commerce platforms and booking systems built to perform and convert visitors into customers.
services.fullDescription: We design and build premium websites that don't just look exceptional — they perform. From landing pages to full e-commerce platforms and custom booking systems, every project is built mobile-first, SEO-optimised, and engineered to convert visitors into customers.

benefits.title: Custom Website Design
benefits.description: Bespoke, brand-aligned designs built to reflect your identity and impress your audience

benefits.title: Mobile-First Development
benefits.description: Flawless experience across all devices — phones, tablets and desktops

benefits.title: E-Commerce & Booking Systems
benefits.description: Fully integrated online stores and booking platforms built to drive conversions

benefits.title: Speed & Performance Optimised
benefits.description: Fast-loading pages that improve user experience and search engine rankings

benefits.title: SEO-Ready from Day One
benefits.description: Built with technical SEO best practices baked in from the very first line of code

benefits.title: Ongoing Support & Maintenance
benefits.description: We don't disappear after launch — ongoing support keeps your site secure and updated

services.title: Restaurant Operations
services.subtitle: Operations Management
services.shortDescription: Full operational support for restaurants — order management, reservations, delivery coordination and customer communication.
services.fullDescription: We take the operational pressure off your restaurant team by managing your customer-facing communications professionally. From taking phone orders and handling reservations to coordinating deliveries and resolving customer queries — we keep your front-of-house running smoothly so you can focus on the kitchen.

benefits.title: Phone Order Taking
benefits.description: Professional agents handle every call, capturing orders accurately and efficiently

benefits.title: Table Reservation Management
benefits.description: Seamless booking management across phone, online and third-party platforms

benefits.title: Delivery Coordination
benefits.description: Driver and courier communication to ensure on-time delivery and happy customers

benefits.title: Customer Query Resolution
benefits.description: Dietary queries, order amendments, complaints — all handled with care and speed

benefits.title: Peak Hour Overflow Support
benefits.description: Extra capacity during busy periods so no call or order ever goes unanswered

benefits.title: Brand Voice Consistency
benefits.description: Agents trained on your menu, tone and values to represent your restaurant perfectly
